title: Dine
text: A contemporary dining concept. Most venues bury the menu and make diners dig for the booking. This one keeps both a single tap away, on the phones people actually search from. Hand-coded from scratch to a perfect 100 on PageSpeed.

title: Barra
text: A Latin American concept that lives on its produce. Most sites shrink the food into thumbnails, so we did the opposite: full-bleed photography that does the selling, with the booking never more than two taps away. No template, no page builder, and a perfect 100 on PageSpeed.

title: Aurelia House
text: A modern Australian concept built around one action: the reservation. Plenty of restaurant sites tell a lovely story and forget to ask for the booking. Here the story, the seasonal menu, and a reserve button that never leaves the screen all point the same way. Hand-coded to a perfect 100 on PageSpeed.
